data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. Verified 4 changed files (repo-switcher.tsx, app-header.tsx, 2 contract tests). Core fix uses useRef bootstrap guard to make all-repos selection sticky. Create flow properly routes through repo chooser in all-repos mode for both button click and Shift+N. All quality gates pass (lint 0 errors, tsc clean, 2025 tests passed, build OK). No security issues or regressions found.
